revision.text: <includeonly>{{Birth date text|dt={{{dt|}}}|{{{gregorian|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}}} (age {{Age|{{#ifeq:"{{lc:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}"|"{{padleft:{{#expr:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}|4|0}}"|<!--Here if it is a 4 digit year only-Test1 satisfied: see talk -->{{{1|0009-11}}}|{{#expr: {{#iferror:{{#ifexpr:((abs({{{1|0009-11}}}))< 1900) and ({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} >1900) | {{#ifexpr:({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}) <2000|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-1900}}|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-2000}} }} |{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}|{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{bce|}}}|b|bd|d|db=*(-1) +1}}}} }}|{{#time:m|{{{1|}}}}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}}}} }})<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Birth-date and age with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Birth-date and age]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | bce | dt | gregorian }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Birth date text|dt={{{dt|}}}|{{{gregorian|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}}} (age {{Age|{{#ifeq:"{{lc:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}"|"{{padleft:{{#expr:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}|4|0}}"|<!--Here if it is a 4 digit year only-Test1 satisfied: see talk -->{{{1|0009-11}}}|{{#expr: {{#iferror:{{#ifexpr:((abs({{{1|0009-11}}}))< 1900) and ({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} >1900) | {{#ifexpr:({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}) <2000|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-1900}}|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-2000}} }} |{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}|{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{bce|}}}|b|bd|d|db=*(-1) +1}}}} }}|{{#time:m|{{{1|}}}}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}}}} }})<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Birth-date and age with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Birth-date and age]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | bce | dt | gregorian }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Birth date text|dt={{{dt|}}}|{{{gregorian|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}}} (age {{Age|{{#ifeq:"{{lc:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}"|"{{padleft:{{#expr:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}|4|0}}"|<!--Here if it is a 4 digit year only-Test1 satisfied: see talk -->{{{1|0009-11}}}|{{#expr: {{#iferror:{{#ifexpr:((abs({{{1|0009-11}}}))< 1900) and ({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} >1900) | {{#ifexpr:({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}) <2000|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-1900}}|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-2000}} }} |{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}|{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{bce|}}}|b|bd|d|db=*(-1) +1}}}} }}|{{#time:m|{{{1|}}}}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}}}} }})<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Birth-date and age with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Birth-date and age]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | bce | dt | gregorian }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Birth date text|dt={{{dt|}}}|{{{gregorian|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}}} (age {{Age|{{#ifeq:"{{lc:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}"|"{{padleft:{{#expr:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}|4|0}}"|<!--Here if it is a 4 digit year only-Test1 satisfied: see talk -->{{{1|0009-11}}}|{{#expr: {{#iferror:{{#ifexpr:((abs({{{1|0009-11}}}))< 1900) and ({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} >1900) | {{#ifexpr:({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}) <2000|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-1900}}|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-2000}} }} |{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}|{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{bce|}}}|b|bd|d|db=*(-1) +1}}}} }}|{{#time:m|{{{1|}}}}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}}}} }})<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Birth-date and age with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Birth-date and age]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | bce | dt | gregorian }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Birth date text|dt={{{dt|}}}|{{{gregorian|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}}} (age {{Age|{{#ifeq:"{{lc:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}"|"{{padleft:{{#expr:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}|4|0}}"|<!--Here if it is a 4 digit year only-Test1 satisfied: see talk -->{{{1|0009-11}}}|{{#expr: {{#iferror:{{#ifexpr:((abs({{{1|0009-11}}}))< 1900) and ({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} >1900) | {{#ifexpr:({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}) <2000|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-1900}}|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-2000}} }} |{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}|{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{bce|}}}|b|bd|d|db=*(-1) +1}}}} }}|{{#time:m|{{{1|}}}}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}}}} }})<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Birth-date and age]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | bce | dt | gregorian }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Birth-date_and_age here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Birth-date_and_age for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{Birth date text|dt={{{dt|}}}|{{{gregorian|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}}} (age {{Age|{{#ifeq:"{{lc:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}"|"{{padleft:{{#expr:{{{1|0009-11}}}}}|4|0}}"|<!--Here if it is a 4 digit year only-Test1 satisfied: see talk -->{{{1|0009-11}}}|{{#expr: {{#iferror:{{#ifexpr:((abs({{{1|0009-11}}}))< 1900) and ({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} >1900) | {{#ifexpr:({{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}) <2000|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-1900}}|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}}-2000}} }} |{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}|{{#time:Y|{{{1|0009-11}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{bce|}}}|b|bd|d|db=*(-1) +1}}}} }}|{{#time:m|{{{1|}}}}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}}}} }})<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Birth-date and age]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | bce | dt | gregorian }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Pages using Birth-date and age with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
